item.content:encoded: It's been nearly a quarter century since i owned the bakiwop.com domain. Tonight? Tonight I couldn't fall asleep so I went downstairs, fired up the pc, and, for some reason, checked to see if it was available (I'd checked on and off over the years to no avail, natch) . . . and there it was, just waiting for me, looking all pretty and shiny on the domain registrar shelf. How cool is that?
